---
title: "Favorites"
---

# Hobbies

## Snowboarding

Last year was my first season snowboarding. I'm no pro but I can stay standing for like 3 minutes...ish.

![Me and my boyfriend on a ski lift.](IMG_1824.JPG)

## Listening to Audiobooks

I like this hobby because I am able to do this while I am doing other things. I have gotten so good at it that I can now listen to audiobooks at 3x speed.

## Traveling

This is a hobby that I have recently started. I have been to Costa Rica, Key West, Las Vegas, and Charleston. I'm also going to go to Cancun this year!
